DISCOVERY 302, JUN-17-2024 HEARING ON DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY AND TO APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. THE MATTER IS ARGUED/CONTESTED. UPON CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT WITHDRAWS ITS ORIGINAL TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT ADOPTS A MODIFIED TENTATIVE RULING AS DISCUSSED DURING THE HEARING. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING THE MODIFIED TENTATIVE RULING AS A WORD DOCUMENT AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM TO JPDEOL@DHILLONLAW.COM. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Written Discovery And To Appear For Deposition And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT AL SHAWA , AN INDIVIDUAL, AL SHAWA DBA RUSSIAN HILL CANNABIS CLUB Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Written Discovery And To Appear For Deposition And Request For Sanctions.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Thomas Purtell, Esq., Law Office of, (415) 722-6291, for Plaintiff.
Steven E. McDonald, Esq., of BLEDSOE, DIESTEL, TREPPA & CRANE LLP, (415) 981-5411, for Defendant RUSSIAN HILL CANNABIS CLUB.

Counsel for Plaintiff and Defendant stipulate to the subject matter begin decided by the Judge Pro Tem. Counsel and the Judge Pro Tem (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to execute the formal stipulation on their behalf.

The matter is argued/contested. Upon conclusion of argument, the court withdraws its original tentative ruling. The court adopts a modified tentative ruling as discussed during the hearing.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating the modified tentative ruling as a Word document and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem to jpdeol@dhillonlaw.com.
